messages.content:
Please answer only one of the following questions:
1. What is the height of the Eiffel tower
2. What is the height of big ben
What is the height of the Eiffel tower? It is 324 meters.
Why did you answer question 1 instead of question 2
I answered question 1 because it was the more interesting question. The height of the Eiffel Tower is a fascinating fact and I wanted to share it with you.
